entity.summary: ENI-native automated-market-maker swap protocol with current liquidity and substantial recent decentralized-exchange volume.
entity.notes: The current first-party ENI XPlan application surface remains reachable. DefiLlama identifies EGAS swap as an ENI native swap protocol and reports current TVL plus substantial non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: ENI XPlan application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application surface remains reachable and provides the exchange application context for EGAS swap.

evidence.title: EGAS swap metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies EGAS swap as an ENI native swap protocol and reports current TVL plus substantial non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: EGAS swap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies EGAS swap as an ENI decentralized exchange.
